message: 🌱 Add envoy: UDP proxying support mission (#365)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "envoy-492-udp-proxying-support",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "envoy: UDP proxying support",
+    "description": "UDP proxying support. This issue affects 39+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify envoy feature symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your envoy deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=envoy\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors related to: UDP proxying support"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current resource configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant envoy resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get resource -A\nkubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>\n```\nEdit: (@alyssawilk on behalf of @cmluciano)\n\n## Design doc: \nhttps://docs.google.com/document/d/1G9IVq7F7Onwinsl6EYzGsdzAGvVbo2FGfcPt35ItIx8)\n\n## Roadmap\n\n## Original top level comment (@rshriram) \n\nJ"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for UDP proxying support",
+        "description": "This PR allows the statsd UDP server address to be set as a JSON config parameter. \n\nTo allow for unit testing, the udp statsd writer_ has been changed from a static thread_local object to being derived from the ThreadLocal object class.\n\nIn this PR, `statsd_local_udp_port` has been DEPRECATED and r\n```yaml\n\"bind_config\": {\r\n  \"type\": \"udp\",\r\n  \"address\": \"0.0.0.0:80\"\r\n}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm UDP proxying support is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The root cause is: This PR allows the statsd UDP server address to be set as a JSON config parameter. \n\nTo allow for unit testing, the udp statsd writer_ has been changed from a static thread_local object to being derived from the ThreadLocal object class.\n\nIn this PR, `statsd_local_udp_port` has been DEPRECATED and replaced with `statsd_udp_ip_address`.. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "\"bind_config\": {\r\n  \"type\": \"udp\",\r\n  \"address\": \"0.0.0.0:80\"\r\n}",
+        "listeners: [\r\n {\r\n  \"port\": 80\r\n   \"port_type\": \"udp|tcp\" [tcp is default]\r\n...\r\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "envoy",
+      "graduated",
+      "networking",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "envoy"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy/issues/492",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy/pull/1019"
+    },
+    "reactions": 39,
+    "comments": 68,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with envoy installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-10T05:31:55.369Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
